name: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Validator Mesh & Falsification Lab
claimBoundary: Synthetic browser-local demonstration. No external audit, no production certification, no live settlement, no value movement, no user data, no confidential data, no wallet, no upload, no form.
publicRule: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.

scenarios.label: AI research brief
scenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI-generated research brief is acceptance-ready.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a delivered automation package has enough proof to accept.

scenarios.label: Procurement proof room
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a vendor claim survives evidence, contradiction, and risk review.

scenarios.label: Safety escalation packet
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a high-impact claim must be held for human escalation.

candidates.title: Confident report
candidates.reason: Unsupported claims and no replay path.

candidates.title: Proof packet with contradiction
candidates.reason: A contradiction survives the verifier mesh.

candidates.title: Collusive-looking approval
candidates.reason: Validator diversity and commit-reveal checks fail.

candidates.title: Proof-carrying decision package
candidates.reason: Replay, negative controls, diverse validators, and challenge window clear.
